roles.core: central bot, D1 schema authority, direct report outbox retry/topic repair, central wallet and callbacks
roles.edge: reseller bots, customer miniapps, old subscription import and service lifecycle
roles.processor: optional advanced schedules, report retries, topic repair, backups and background jobs

edge: PROCESSOR_WORKER (optional because CORE fallback is supported)

features: customers can attach an existing PasarGuard service by submitting its current HTTPS subscription link in the reseller bot or miniapp
the public subscription info endpoint resolves the username and the reseller PasarGuard API verifies the service belongs to that reseller
imported services support status, renewal, volume increase, current subscription link and link revocation through the reseller bot
the same remote service cannot be claimed by another Telegram account or reseller bot
service imports are routed to a dedicated report topic
pending report delivery and deleted-topic repair run directly from the central Worker cron
only the central Worker needs a cron trigger for report delivery; a separate processor cron is no longer required for the report outbox
processor service binding remains optional for advanced scheduled jobs such as daily summaries, campaigns, backups and notifications
report flush in reseller groups falls back to the central Worker when PROCESSOR_WORKER is unavailable
test_all_topics command validates every configured topic and sends one test message to each
CubePay, Plisio, automatic USD rates and PasarGuard 5.1 API key compatibility are preserved

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.central_cron_report_fallback: core scheduled handler flushes pending report_outbox before and after optional processor jobs
validation.topic_self_repair: missing or invalid message_thread_id is recreated on demand and the message is retried once
validation.service_import_route: old subscription import is visible in reseller bot and miniapp and records a dedicated service_imports report
validation.live_pasarguard_import: not run; no active customer subscription link was supplied
validation.live_telegram_topics: not run; no production bot tokens/group IDs were supplied
